packs.description: STRESS-TEST PACK — adversarial contrarian personas for sanity-checking synthetic panel consensus. NOT a representative ICP. Use alongside a real ICP pack to expose weak signals: if even the contrarian agrees, the signal is real; if the panel produces uniform agreement, the contrarian forces exposure of weak reasoning.
packs.name: contrarian-stress

packs.description: Fintech product managers across consumer banking, B2B payments, lending, wealth management, and crypto/web3. Designed for fintech feature research, regulatory-compliant product surveys, and PM/eng workflow studies in regulated environments.
packs.name: fintech-pm

packs.description: Synthetic ICP for SynthPanel itself — UX researchers, PMs, market-research consultants, early-stage founders, AI/ML researchers, and devtool builders who represent the people who actually use SynthPanel.
packs.name: icp-synthpanel

packs.description: Synthetic ICP for Traitprint Cloud — job seekers and recruiters using the hosted candidate/trait matching platform. Covers early-career through senior candidates, plus in-house, agency, and founder-led hiring perspectives.
packs.name: Traitprint Cloud ICP

packs.description: Synthetic ICP for Traitprint Local — developers using the MIT-licensed CLI and MCP server to extract trait profiles from their own documents without sending data to a cloud service.
packs.name: icp-traitprint-local

packs.description: Security engineering practitioners across application security, infrastructure security, detection engineering, GRC, and security tooling buying. Designed for SaaS security product research, security tool category surveys, and AppSec/DetEng workflow studies.
packs.name: Security Engineer
